title: Envelope
description: Cross-cutting wrapper for every inter-layer message, CLI --json output, and MCP structuredContent. contract_version is the semver of the producing layer's contract; additive fields are MINOR (consumers ignore unknown fields), removal/rename/type-change/meaning-change is MAJOR.

contract_version.description: Semver of the producing layer's contract (e.g. search@1.0.0 emits "1.0.0").

ok.description: True on success; on false, data is null and error is populated.

data.description: Layer-specific payload (object | array | null). Constrained per-layer.

Meta.description: Free-form diagnostics; mirrors MCP _meta. Adding keys is never breaking.

trace_id.description: W3C traceparent-compatible id for cross-layer tracing.
